title: Bavli loci — witness-backed index
description: Curated passages: what witnesses show vs ikkar, machloket, maaseh, or aggadah in the record.

denial_scale.0: Fully present / uncensored in target layer
denial_scale.3: Removed or heavily censored in Vilna-era print

tradition_status.ikkar: Presented as settled halacha or consensus
tradition_status.machloket: Explicit dispute between authorities in the text
tradition_status.maaseh: Reported event / baraita / narrative in the record

topic.en: Baraita on trial and execution of Yeshu ha-Notzri
topic.he: ברaita על דין ותליית יֵשׁוּ הַנּוֹצְרִי

loci.tradition_note: Historical-legal baraita inside a mesis/sanhedrin sugya. Gemara argues whether he had zechut — not Jewish creed about Christianity.

sources.label: Instone-Brewer — Jesus' Trial in the Uncensored Talmud

loci.english_summary: Trial and execution of Yeshu (Jesus). The gemara asks whether he might have deserved acquittal (had zechut / merit) — a legal argument inside a mesis case, not church doctrine about whether Jesus was OK.

topic.en: ben Stada / ben Pandera — mesis execution report
topic.he: בן סטada / בן פndera — מעשה במesis

loci.tradition_note: Illustrative case in mesis procedure; amoraic wordplay on names — narrative within halachic framework.
loci.english_summary: Ben Stada / ben Pandera — reported execution of a mesis (enticer). Names linked in tradition to Yeshu passages elsewhere.

topic.en: Yeshu ha-Notzri in Gehinnom / Onkelos necromancy narrative
topic.he: יֵשׁוּ הַנּוֹצְרִי בגיהinnom — aggadah in destruction context

loci.tradition_note: Aggadic passage on Roman destruction era; not halachic ruling or ikkar emunah.
loci.english_summary: Aggadic story: Onkelos summons Yeshu ha-Notzri from Gehinnom. Narrative in destruction-era context, not halacha.

topic.en: Yeshu as student of R. Yehoshua ben Perahiah
topic.he: יֵשׁוּ תalmid של ר' יהושע בן פרחיה

loci.tradition_note: Aggadic biography linking Yeshu to a sage; debated historicity — story, not halacha.
loci.english_summary: Aggadah: Yeshu as a student of R. Yehoshua ben Perahiah — biography story, debated historicity.

topic.en: Parallel: Yeshu and R. Yehoshua ben Perahiah
topic.he: גרסה מקבילה — יֵשׁוּ ור' יהושע בן פרחיה

loci.tradition_note: Parallel aggadic tradition to Sanhedrin 107b; same witness profile.
loci.english_summary: Parallel aggadic tradition to Sanhedrin 107b — Yeshu and R. Yehoshua ben Perahiah.

topic.en: ben Stada / ben Pandera — sorcery narrative
topic.he: בן סטada — נarrative in magic/sorcery context

loci.tradition_note: Reported case in sorcery sugya; linked by tradition to Sanhedrin 67a identities.
loci.english_summary: Ben Stada in a sorcery narrative — linked by tradition to Sanhedrin 67a.

topic.en: גוים restored where Vilna Rashi read עובדי כוכבים
topic.he: החזרת גוים במקום עובדי כוכבים — רש"י פתיחת מסכת

loci.tradition_note: Opening mishnah on commerce before gentile festivals — legal argument; dispute here is censored *language*, not the halacha itself.

sources.label: Waxman — Uncensored Printings for Avodah Zarah

loci.english_summary: Rashi restored to read gentiles (goyim) where Vilna print had the censored phrase idol-worshippers.

topic.en: עכו"ם acronym in Rashi (should read גוים/מין)

loci.tradition_note: Rashi on Shema / minim — legal-exegetical point; עכו"ם is post-censor acronym, not original Rashi vocabulary.
loci.english_summary: Rashi uses the censor acronym akum where manuscripts read goyim or minim — language censorship in commentary.

topic.en: Oven of Akhnai — bat kol vs human majority
topic.he: תנור של עכnai — בat kol מול רב majority

loci.tradition_note: Famous meta-dispute: halacha is not in heaven. Not censored — included as contrast (argument in text, not suppression).
loci.english_summary: Oven of Akhnai — famous dispute: law is not in heaven; human majority over bat kol. Not censored; shows argument on the record.

topic.en: Why halacha does not follow Rabbi Meir — dispute on record

loci.tradition_note: Meta-dispute about following a sage whose full reasoning peers could not grasp. Not censored — shows argument in the text without suppression.
loci.english_summary: Why halacha does not follow Rabbi Meir — meta-dispute about a sage peers could not fully follow. Not censored.

topic.en: Adam created single — universal human dignity teaching
topic.he: לפיכך נברא אדם יחידי — כבוד הבריות

loci.tradition_note: Often cited in interfaith ethics; present everywhere — baseline row (not censored).
loci.english_summary: Adam created alone — teaching on universal human dignity. Widely present; not a censorship locus.

loci.tradition_note: Pattern row — not one daf. Censor acronym replacing גוים across commentary; see censorship_audit.json.
loci.english_summary: Corpus-wide pattern: akum acronym in Rashi/Tosafot (~100 places) replacing goyim — see censorship audit.
